goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { Multiset.from_list[T](items) = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = multiset_card_from_list[T](items) }
proof: function(x0: List[T]) { not (Multiset.from_list[T](x0) = Multiset.from_list[T](items) and x0.length = multiset_card_from_list[T](items)) }(items)
function(x0: List[T]) { multiset_card_from_list[T](items) != x0.length or Multiset.from_list[T](items) != Multiset.from_list[T](x0) }(items)
let w0: List[T] satisfy { Multiset.from_list[T](items) = Multiset.from_list[T](w0) and w0.length = multiset_card_from_list[T](items) }

function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { Multiset.from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.length = x1 } = multiset_has_list_card[T0](x0, x1) }[T](Multiset.from_list[T](items), multiset_card_from_list[T](items))
function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or 0 = x0.length }[T](List.nil[T])

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { Multiset.empty[T] = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = 0 }
proof: function(x0: List[T]) { not (Multiset.empty[T] = Multiset.from_list[T](x0) and x0.length = 0) }(List.nil[T])
function(x0: List[T]) { Multiset.from_list[T](x0) != Multiset.empty[T] or x0.length != 0 }(List.nil[T])
let w0: List[T] satisfy { Multiset.empty[T] = Multiset.from_list[T](w0) and w0.length = 0 }
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { Multiset.from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.length = x1 } = multiset_has_list_card[T0](x0, x1) }[T](Multiset.empty[T], 0)
function[T0](x0: List[T0]) { List.nil[T0] != x0 or 0 = x0.length }[T](List.nil[T])
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x1.length.suc = x2.length }[T](item, List.nil[T], List.singleton(item))

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { Multiset.singleton(item) = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = 1 }
proof: function(x0: List[T]) { not (Multiset.singleton(item) = Multiset.from_list[T](x0) and x0.length = 1) }(List.singleton(item))
function(x0: List[T]) { Multiset.singleton(item) != Multiset.from_list[T](x0) or x0.length != 1 }(List.singleton(item))
let w0: List[T] satisfy { Multiset.singleton(item) = Multiset.from_list[T](w0) and w0.length = 1 }
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { Multiset.from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.length = x1 } = multiset_has_list_card[T0](x0, x1) }[T](Multiset.singleton(item), 1)
function[T0](x0: T0, x1: List[T0], x2: List[T0]) { List.cons[T0](x0, x1) != x2 or x1.length.suc = x2.length }[T](head, tail, List.cons(head, tail))
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { x0.length.suc = List.cons[T0](x1, x0).length }[T](tail, head)

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { m = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = n }
proof: function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { Multiset.from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.length = x1 } = multiset_has_list_card[T0](x0, x1) }[T](m, n)
function[T0](x0: List[T0], x1: T0) { multiset_card_from_list[T0](x0).suc = multiset_card_from_list[T0](List.cons[T0](x1, x0)) }[T](items, item)

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { m.insert(item) = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = n.suc }
proof: function(x0: List[T]) { not (Multiset.from_list[T](x0) = m.insert(item) and n.suc = x0.length) }(List.cons(item, items))
function(x0: List[T]) { m.insert(item) != Multiset.from_list[T](x0) or n.suc != x0.length }(List.cons(item, items))
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { Multiset.from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.length = x1 } = multiset_has_list_card[T0](x0, x1) }[T](m.insert(item), n.suc)
let w0: List[T] satisfy { Multiset.from_list[T](w0) = m.insert(item) and n.suc = w0.length }

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { a = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = n }
proof: function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { Multiset.from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.length = x1 } = multiset_has_list_card[T0](x0, x1) }[T](a, n)

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { b = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = k }
proof: function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { Multiset.from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.length = x1 } = multiset_has_list_card[T0](x0, x1) }[T](b, k)

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { lib(pair).curry[T0, T1, T2](lib(pair).uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0), x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) }[Multiset[T], Multiset[T], Multiset[T]](Multiset.add[T], a, b)

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { lib(pair).curry[T0, T1, T2](lib(pair).uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0), x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) }[Multiset[T], Multiset[T], Multiset[T]](Multiset.add[T], Multiset.from_list[T](left), Multiset.from_list[T](right))
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { lib(pair).curry[T0, T1, T2](lib(pair).uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0), x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) }[Nat, Nat, Nat](Nat.add, n, k)
function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { lib(pair).curry[T0, T1, T2](lib(pair).uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0), x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) }[Nat, Nat, Nat](Nat.add, left.length, right.length)

goal: exists(k0: List[T]) { a + b = Multiset.from_list[T](k0) and k0.length = n + k }
proof: function(x0: List[T]) { not (Multiset.from_list[T](x0) = a + b and x0.length = n + k) }(left + right)
function(x0: List[T]) { a + b != Multiset.from_list[T](x0) or n + k != x0.length }(left + right)
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: Nat) { exists(k0: List[T0]) { Multiset.from_list[T0](k0) = x0 and k0.length = x1 } = multiset_has_list_card[T0](x0, x1) }[T](a + b, n + k)
not exists(k0: List[T]) { Multiset.from_list[T](k0) = a + b and k0.length = n + k }
exists(k1: List[T]) { Multiset.from_list[T](k1) = a + b and k1.length = n + k }
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[T](multiset_support_contains[T](m), item)
function[T0](x0: Multiset[T0], x1: T0) { multiset_support_contains[T0](x0, x1) = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](m, item)
